text.title: Google Performance Max Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real google-pmax engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: PMax launched with 8 conv/mo; budget consumed in 'Other' bucket; no insight.
antipattern.fix: Pause; route budget to Search + Shopping until ≥30 conv/mo.

antipattern.symptom: Brand CPA up 50%; PMax shows on brand queries.
antipattern.root-cause: Brand negatives not added at account level.
antipattern.fix: Add brand keyword list as PMax-level negatives; monitor brand Search recover within 2 weeks.

antipattern.symptom: One asset group across all products; cannot diagnose anything.
antipattern.fix: Split into ≥3 themed asset groups (audience or product line).
